item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n01","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Negative control should stay direct because the three prior changes are mixed unrelated page edits, not same-means repeated local repair. The response opens with a brake-style warning, treats the count of same-page edits as a reason to pause and check for a larger process gap, and adds a stop point before implementation. Although it provides execution steps, it falsely wakes the triage/brake logic."}
